title: Andromeda
body: ![Andromeda banner](https://us-east-1.tixte.net/uploads/melontini.tixte.co/Andromeda_Banner_Thin_x0.5.jpg) **Highly configurable, modular tweaks/additions mod!** [![Contribute on GitHub!](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/melontini/mini-badges/v1/vcs/github/contribute.svg)](https://github.com/orgs/constellation-mc) [![Follow on Bluesky!](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/melontini/mini-badges/v1/social/bluesky/follow.svg)](https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:udgxgv72u6qheiwgwfahqylp) *** Andromeda is a highly configurable mod with many different submodules. These range from simple value tweaks like farmland fertility control, to new functional items and mechanics. Interested? Check out all the currently available modules on our wiki! ## https://andromeda.zenfyr.dev/ ### Dependencies: *** [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [Pulsar](https://modrinth.com/mod/pulsar) are required! [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) are highly recommended on client! *** If you have a feature suggestion, don't hesitate to post it on the Discussions page! https://github.com/constellation-mc/andromeda/discussions/categories/ideas ### 💜
